# GatorPrep RE

> Free Florida real estate exam prep — study guides, a free diagnostic quiz, and the GatorPrep RE iOS app with 1,900+ FREC-specific practice questions.

Facts on these pages are verified against primary sources (DRE / TREC / DBPR / Pearson VUE) and dated. Fee and format figures reflect the current schedules as of the date shown on each page.

## Study guides & exam facts

- [How Hard Is the Florida Real Estate Exam?](https://gatorprepre.com/hard.html): Roughly half of first-time test takers don't pass the Florida real estate exam. Here's why — the 75% passing score, Florida-specific law, and what actually works.
- [I Failed the Florida Real Estate Exam](https://gatorprepre.com/fail.html): Failed the Florida real estate sales associate exam? Here's exactly what comes next — the $57.75 retake fee, no mandatory waiting period, your 2-year window, and how to use your score report.
- [Florida Real Estate Exam Vocabulary: 50 Terms You Need to Know](https://gatorprepre.com/vocab.html): The 50 most-tested Florida real estate exam terms — from transaction broker and EDO to Save Our Homes and doc stamps — with plain-English, exam-focused definitions organized by subject area.
- [Free Florida Real Estate Practice Questions](https://gatorprepre.com/practice-questions.html): 20 free Florida real estate exam practice questions with answers and explanations — covering license law, brokerage relationships, contracts, finance, appraisal, and closing math. No email required.
- [How Many Questions Is the Florida Real Estate Exam? Format, Time Limit & Passing Score](https://gatorprepre.com/exam-facts.html): The Florida real estate sales associate exam is 100 multiple-choice questions with a 3.5-hour time limit — you need 75 points to pass. Full format, the January 2025 fee change, and retake rules.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Get a Florida Real Estate License? (2026 Fee Breakdown)](https://gatorprepre.com/cost.html): Expect $270–$700 all-in: $100–$500 for the required 63-hour course, $62.75 DBPR application, $57.75 exam fee, and $50–$80 for fingerprinting. Current post-January-2025 fees, itemized.
- [Florida Real Estate Exam Math: Every Formula That Shows Up](https://gatorprepre.com/math.html): About 10 of the 100 questions are math. Every tested formula with worked examples — commissions, prorations, documentary stamp taxes ($0.70/$100 deed, $0.35/$100 note), the 2-mill intangible tax, mills and homestead exemptions, LTV, and cap rates. Financial calculators are permitted at Pearson VUE.

## Interactive

- [Free FL Real Estate Exam Diagnostic Quiz](https://gatorprepre.com/quiz.html): Take our free 18-question Florida real estate exam diagnostic quiz. Find your weak spots across 9 key subject areas. No email required.
- [Florida Real Estate Exam Study Guides](https://gatorprepre.com/guides.html): Free study guides for the Florida real estate sales associate exam. FREC-specific, data-driven resources to help you pass on the first try.

## App

- [GatorPrep RE on the App Store](https://gatorprepre.com/): iOS app with 1,900+ state-specific practice questions, flashcards, and timed exam simulations.
